summary: Iteration 64: Admin Split Testing - All tests PASSED. React admin is now admin-only with proper routing, 404 handling, and all 8 nav items working. Chatbot endpoints return correct response shapes for Next.js ChatWidget integration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin split complete. React CRA at /app/frontend is admin-only. Public site is on Next.js at /app/next-app (deployed to Vercel). All chatbot endpoints working with correct response shapes.

admin_login.details: Login with password 'AgileHealth2026admin' returns JWT token and redirects to /admin dashboard

admin_404_page.details: Unknown URLs (e.g., /catalog, /home) show 404 page with links to agileortho.in and /admin/login

public_site_link.details: Sidebar shows 'Open public site →' link pointing to https://agileortho.in (opens in new tab)

all_8_nav_items.details: Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads, Analytics, Products, PDF Import, WhatsApp, Review - all load without errors

robots_meta_tag.details: HTML meta tag <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow, noarchive"> present

page_title.details: Page title is 'Agile Ortho — Admin Console'

chatbot_query_endpoint.details: Returns {answer, sources, confidence} with correct types

chatbot_history_endpoint.details: Works for new sessions (returns empty messages array)

admin_stats_endpoint.details: Returns stats with JWT auth, 401 without auth

admin_pipeline_endpoint.details: Returns pipeline data with JWT auth, 401 without auth

admin_analytics_endpoint.details: Returns analytics data with JWT auth, 401 without auth

no_broken_imports.details: No references to deleted files (ChatWidget, SiteHeader, SiteFooter, Layout, Home, Products) in admin code
